memory_scope: Old 2026-05 LDD saved-memory snapshots after 2026-06 runtime records and reports exist.
items_to_keep: Open risks and active trigger rules.
Pending command or Command Intelligence context that has not been resolved.
items_to_archive: Old broker/Binance visible account-number summaries after they are represented in records or reports.
Historical sync details that are useful for audit but no longer needed in active memory.
items_to_delete_or_remove_from_active_me: Superseded 2026-05 account snapshot memories after confirming details exist in GitHub/runtime records or reports.
Duplicate saved memories that repeat old account numbers without adding durable rules.
Temporary instructions that were executed, cancelled, or superseded.
items_requiring_human_review: Any memory that might contain a durable rule.
Any memory that contains an unresolved risk or active command.
Any memory whose details have not yet been archived into records/ or reports/.
rationale: The user should not have to delete dozens of old memories manually.
Latest 2026-06 LDD records and reports provide a durable archive.
Active memory should preserve rules and latest checkpoint rather than every historical snapshot.
safety_notes: Do not delete durable project rules.
Do not delete latest active checkpoint.
Do not remove pending command context unless executed, cancelled, or superseded.
Cleanup is a recommendation and requires user approval.
